title: Binks family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Binks family''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] bloodline, originally from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Its members included:
*[[Jar Jar Binks's father|George R. Binks]]
*[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], George's son
*[[Abso Bar Binks]], Jar Jar's son, and George's grandson

==Family tree==
  [[George R. Binks]]--+--[[Jar Jar Binks's mother|Unknown spouse]]
   |
   |
   [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]--+--[[Abso Bar Binks's mother|Unknown female]]
  |
  |
 [[Abso Bar Binks]]

==Behind the scenes==
*It is unknown whether the non-canonical [[Jay-Jay Bin]]— was intended to be a member of the Binks family.

{{Interlang
|es=Familia Binks
}}
